title: USDA Lexical Format Capability Contract

included: string, number, asset-reference, path-reference, and punctuation tokenization
source locations sufficient for parser diagnostics

model.SourceText: A UTF-8 USDA text buffer handed to lexical parsing after resource opening.
model.TokenStream: A target-native tokenizer, scanner, parser substrate, or direct recursive-descent interface that presents the same lexical boundaries.
model.SourceLocation: Line/column or equivalent stable diagnostic location metadata.

laws: identifier validity must consume the identifier scanner capability
lexing must not create document-model specs or fields
lexing must not parse or canonicalize USD namespace paths beyond recognizing delimiters
lexing must not construct typed field values
